theme_and_archetype.description: A modern, Japanese-inspired aesthetic ('Ma' minimalism) blended with Duolingo-style gamification. It balances the serene discipline of an Aikido dojo (warm woods, paper textures, generous whitespace) with engaging, vibrant gamification elements (streaks, XP, quests) to cater to both children and adults.
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Patients/students need calm and focus to learn, but kids need vivid rewards to stay engaged. The dual-mode design uses a unified earthy palette with scalable UI density.

usage.headings: Outfit, font-bold, tracking-tight. (e.g., text-4xl to text-6xl for main heroes). NEVER use Inter for headings.
usage.body: DM Sans, leading-relaxed. Highly legible, geometric but approachable.

color_palette.rules: Avoid large flat areas of pure white where possible; use the Washi paper/sand hex (#F7F5F0) to reduce eye strain. Use Crimson strictly for primary actions, alerts, and Dojo branding. Use Gold exclusively for streaks, Ki points, and level-ups.

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for badges/pills

grid_modes.adults: Mode B (Control Room): Dense grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4), tight gaps (gap-4). Focus on metrics, technique lists, and efficiency.
grid_modes.kids: Mode A (Tetris/Quest Path): Linear or asymmetrical grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8), wide gaps (gap-8). Focus on the 'Quest Journey', large mascot illustrations, and single-focus tasks.

components_strategy.cards: Neumorphic/Tactile variant. Flat white background (#FFFFFF) with a delicate 1px border (border-stone-200) and a very soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm). On hover: slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow (shadow-md).
components_strategy.header: Glassmorphism (Crystal variant). backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F7F5F0]/80, sticky top, z-50. Must contain Logo, Streak Counter (Gold Flame), Ki Points, and Profile toggle.
components_strategy.sidebar: Standard desktop sidebar, hidden on mobile (replaced by bottom nav or hamburger). Clean, left-aligned links with Lucide icons.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary: bg-[#D32F2F] text-white hover:bg-[#B71C1C] rounded-xl. Secondary: bg-white text-stone-900 border-2 border-stone-200 hover:border-stone-300.
components_strategy.gamification_widgets: Use thick, rounded progress bars (h-4 rounded-full bg-stone-200, fill with #F59E0B). Display streaks prominently.

interactive_elements.hover_states: All clickable elements must change background or text color on hover. Example: hover:bg-stone-100 hover:text-crimson.
interactive_elements.animations: Use Framer Motion for page transitions (fade in, slight upward translate). Stagger list items (Techniques, Virtues). Add a subtle 'pulse' animation to the active Quest or Daily Streak if in danger of breaking.
interactive_elements.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements must have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='nav-link-dojo', data-testid='quest-card-start', data-testid='mode-toggle', data-testid='master-tanaka-chat').

master_tanaka.description: Official avatar of Master Tanaka. Use in a floating chat widget or as a mentor providing daily quests/advice.

dojo_background.description: Traditional dojo interior with tatami and martial artist.

media_and_assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react'. Recommended: Swords (Dojo), Flame (Streak), Map (Quests), Target (Techniques), Medal (Belts), Scroll (Virtues).

page_specific_guidelines.dashboard_dojo: Include a prominent 'Mode Toggle' (Jeune Samouraï vs Confirmé). Kids Mode: large central quest path, Master Tanaka giving instructions, big 'Play Next Game' CTA. Adult Mode: Bento grid of recent techniques, training stats, upcoming belt requirements.
page_specific_guidelines.techniques: Cardless or dense list layout for adults with advanced filtering (tags: Ikkyo, Nikyo, etc.). For kids, show locked/unlocked visual states (grayed out vs vibrant).
page_specific_guidelines.virtual_dojo: The 21 mini-games should be presented like a level map or a vibrant grid of arcade cabinets/dojo rooms.
page_specific_guidelines.belts: Use vertical timeline (The Path). Crimson for active belt, Gold for next goal. Show XP required.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all generated components are in standard Next.js React (.js/.jsx) syntax, heavily utilizing Tailwind CSS.
Create the Dashboard UI with a state variable `isKidsMode` (boolean). Render the 'Quest Path' (Mode A) when true, and 'Bento Grid' (Mode B) when false.
Integrate Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them. Strip away the default 'Vercel' look (e.g., replace default gray borders with our Washi/Stone palette).
Implement the 'Master Tanaka' feature as a sticky, absolute, or floating element that provides context-aware help or daily quests.
NEVER use placeholder text for image URLs. ONLY use the provided URLs in the media_and_assets section.
Strictly follow the color palette. Do not use generic tailwind blue/teal unless necessary for specific alerts.
Add data-testid to EVERY button, link, and major interactive card.
